It's awesome to spend my live with you. I'm looking forward to spending the rest of our lives together. Last night I sent an angel to look over you as you slept. The angel returned to me and when I asked why? The angels said that angels do not watch over angels."

My friend Jason is a Scorpio while his girlfriend is a Leo. He's faithful to her and wiukd never cheat on her. When he broke up with his ex he was driven over the edge. Even when a stranger talk to him there was an edge of hostility to his voice. But as soon as he had a new relationship target ot took the edge of his emotional upset. His ex.is swimming champion who far outshines us in any swimming styles. Shes tall and curvy who definitely has the edge over lots of swimmers. Recently he got into a scuffle with a guy who was hitting on his girlfriend. The police showed up later and assigned jealousy as the motive for the scuffle. Just the other day they dined in a restaurant of a hotel which is midway between his place and K-11 Musea. They queued for almost an hour outside the restaurant. The queue was so huge that it stretched from the counter through the lobby area and out the main entrance to the hotel. A stout guy tried to cut in line but was caught. Yesterday I visited their place. Jason and I met at a midway point between his place and mine then he took me to the bus bound for his place. A group of people were in the way near the bus stop so jason said "excuse me" The line was so big stretching down the road to the furthest mini bus stop. We waited in line for half an hour until three shuttle buses came along at once. Meanwhile some people mistook this long queue for the queue for other places. A couple came up to us and asked "are you in the queue for Cluny park?" as they wanna be sure that it's the right queue. A stout man pushed in at the head of the queue. Later a slender guy jumped the queue. The lady behind him said "excuse me. The end of the queue is back there" A woman stood beside a guy who was midway through the queue. While pretending to look at her phone she edged furtively behind him who didn't realise she was there. Some people might have noticed it but ignored it. Jason seemed on edge. It turns out he has a job interview tomorrow. Never has he felt so on edge before an interview. Jason is currently a head chef at a five star hotel and feels hea found his niche. His elder brother has also found his niche as a professor having worked as a researcher for three years. He sometimes has a snooze at lunchtime because he has so much work to do that he feels drained. He usually naps on the sofa or at his desk by the fireplace when everyone else's eating lunch outside. He once brought his work along to the library where he dozed off at the table. Having a snooze especially by the fire is a marvelous way to replenish your energy though. His younger brother has just completed a phd and is on the way to becoming a professor.Japan is on the way to becoming the worlds strongest economy.His eldest brother is robust and healthy.He does lots of strength and conditioning exercises in his robust sneakers.After his gym session he usually drinks a cup of robust coffee and a glass of robust wine. He lives in japan where the economy and the political system are robust.His elder sister has opened an antique shop which created a great impression on me. There's an exquisite antique that engages my interest.I bet you the shop engages lots of passers-by. I got a favourable impression of it. His uncle has recently passed.away at the age of ninety nine. I offer my sincere condolences to his uncle's family. His friend Jo said "my condolences on the loss of your uncle" His mum too sent her condolences to his family.His dad also wrote "our condolences go to his family" Jason hadnt heard from his cousin for years until yesterday when he received a call from her.They chatted with exquisite delight. She told Jason that there was a bully in her class so he told her not to engage with her. Just stay out of her way as much as possible.Jason lives on The Peak and owns many houses. Unlike Mayweather, he's never ostentatious though extremely wealthy. You can find out how ostentatious his lifestyle is on YouTube such as his house and car collections.
